task_description: QuantMail Phase 66.1 Wire-up & Unify: Fix api-client, add real auth, build unified App Router shell with navigation, create API proxy routes, migrate all 13 Pages Router screens into App Router with proper styling/data/types, wire compose with real EmailComposer, remove dead handlers and src/pages/. Make QuantMail a cohesive, branded, fully-wired app.

verification.summary: Typecheck passes (10/10 tasks). All 246 tests pass (31 test files). No dead onClick handlers, no dead command palette actions, no localhost:3001 references, src/pages/ deleted, no local type redefinitions. 79 files changed: 3512 insertions, 7389 deletions (net reduction due to removing duplicated Pages Router code).
